standardMeaning.ja: 欠かせないこと、求められること。

misreading.ja: 現在だけでなく未来にも生成されうるもの
misreading.en: Something that can be generated in the future, not only supplied now.

standardMeaning.ja: そうあってほしいと願うこと。

misreading.ja: 環境に形づくられる可塑的な方向
misreading.en: A plastic direction shaped by environment.

standardMeaning.ja: 物事の性質や良し悪しのあり方。

misreading.ja: 欲望や社会を分岐させる深い属性
misreading.en: A deep property that branches desire and society.

standardMeaning.ja: 知識、能力、態度などを育てること。

misreading.ja: 欲望の向きを変える経験設計
misreading.en: Experience design that changes the direction of desire.

standardMeaning.ja: 個人としての人間。

misreading.ja: 場所・風土・サービスで変化する存在
misreading.en: A being changed by place, climate, and service.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: 生きていること、生活や人生。

misreading.ja: 場所によって許容される暮らしの幅
misreading.en: The range of living a place allows.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: さまざまな違いが存在していること。

misreading.ja: 多様な風土によって支えられる生存可能性
misreading.en: Survivability sustained by diverse climates and places.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: 人間や物事が存在する全体。

misreading.ja: 人が生きていける場所の選択肢の束
misreading.en: A set of places in which one might be able to live.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: 真ん中、または物事の重要な核。

misreading.ja: 欲求・問題・設計が狙いがちな仮想焦点
misreading.en: A virtual focal point that desire, problems, and design tend to aim at.

standardMeaning.ja: 渦を巻きながら進む形。

misreading.ja: 環境・美意識・デザインが相互に強化される循環
misreading.en: A cycle in which environment, aesthetics, and design reinforce each other.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: 文字や記号を理解すること。

misreading.ja: 風土や場所の条件を解釈すること
misreading.en: To interpret the conditions of a place or climate.

sources.title: Designing with fuudo: Notes from the edge of Japan

standardMeaning.ja: 長さ、量、程度などを調べること。

misreading.ja: 鮮やかさ・物差し・複数尺度で世界を捉えること
misreading.en: To grasp the world through vividness and multiple measures.

sources.title: How we measure distance by vividness

standardMeaning.ja: 閉じているものをあけること。

misreading.ja: 場所や関係を通りへ差し出すこと
misreading.en: To offer a place or relation slightly toward the street.

sources.title: On letting fifty centimeters speak three hundred years

standardMeaning.ja: 体を起こして足で支えること。

misreading.ja: 倫理的・地理的・関係的な位置を選ぶこと
misreading.en: To choose an ethical, geographical, or relational position.

sources.title: On letting fifty centimeters speak three hundred years

standardMeaning.ja: 目的の場所や相手に到達すること。

misreading.ja: 小さな設計判断が遠くの行動や生に影響すること
misreading.en: For a small design judgment to affect distant behavior or life.

sources.title: The left-handed rope: On a sacred design pattern, and the long reach of small reversals

standardMeaning.ja: 陸地を隔てて広がる塩水の大きな水域。
standardMeaning.en: A large body of salt water that lies between lands.

misreading.ja: 島々を隔てる壁ではなく、生活と耕作を往復させる結合の媒体。
misreading.en: Not a wall between islands, but a medium that lets life and cultivation move back and forth.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 海や川などの水面ではない、地表の乾いた部分。
standardMeaning.en: The dry surface of the earth, as opposed to sea or water.

misreading.ja: つながりの前提ではなく、道が切り開かれるまで人を隔てるもの。
misreading.en: Not the default condition of connection, but what keeps people apart until a road is cut open.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 人や車などが通るために設けられた経路。
standardMeaning.en: A route made for people, vehicles, or movement.

misreading.ja: 自然な接続ではなく、切実な必要と労苦によって陸に刻まれる関係。
misreading.en: Not a natural connection, but a relation carved into land by need and labor.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 声に旋律やリズムをつけて表現される言葉や音楽。
standardMeaning.en: Words or music expressed with voice, melody, and rhythm.

misreading.ja: 土地と感情を古い時間から運んでくる風土のタイムカプセル。
misreading.en: A time capsule of locality and feeling carried forward from an older time.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: ある範囲や土地の最も南にある端。
standardMeaning.en: The southernmost edge of a place or region.

misreading.ja: 海の向こうにありながら、生活圏のこちら側に属している端。
misreading.en: An edge across the water that still belongs to this side of lived territory.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 住む場所とは別の土地へ通って作物を育てる農耕のあり方。
standardMeaning.en: A form of farming in which people travel from where they live to cultivate fields elsewhere.

misreading.ja: 海が隔たりではなく生活インフラだったことを示す日々の往復リズム。
misreading.en: A daily rhythm proving that the sea once worked less as separation than as living infrastructure.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 陸続きでありながら交通が不便で孤立した場所。
standardMeaning.en: A place on land that is isolated because access is difficult.

misreading.ja: 例外的な不便ではなく、道がまだない陸のもともとの姿。
misreading.en: Not an exceptional inconvenience, but the original condition of land before roads arrive.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north

standardMeaning.ja: 住んでいる場所を離れて、別の土地へ行くこと。
standardMeaning.en: Leaving one place and going to another.

misreading.ja: 空間を移動することだけでなく、歌を通って別の時代へ行き来すること。
misreading.en: Not only movement through space, but movement through song into another time.

notes: From: The southern shore that is in the north
